name: Buttermilk Bread ABM
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring all ingredients to room temperature.
2. Pour the ingredients into the bread machine in the following order: yeast, flour, buttermilk powder, sugar, salt, butter, and water.
3. Set the "baking control" at 11 o'clock.
4. Select "white bread" setting.
5. Push Start button.
